summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v5.0 WhatsApp-only conversational travel booking agent. All 27 backend tests pass (100% success rate). Frontend status dashboard working correctly with live health data display.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns 200 with per-operator payment status (configured/sandbox/missing)
Health endpoint returns all 4 payment operators: mtn_momo, moov_money, google_pay, apple_pay
Health endpoint returns all integrations: claude_ai, amadeus, whatsapp, whisper
Health endpoint returns status=healthy, type=whatsapp_agent, version=5.0.0
Welcome message 'bonjour' returns state=idle
Travel request transitions to awaiting_flight_selection with flights array
Flight selection transitions to awaiting_payment_method with booking_ref
MTN MoMo (option 1) initiates payment with selected_payment_method=mtn_momo
Moov Money (option 2) initiates payment with selected_payment_method=moov_money
Google Pay (option 3) initiates card payment with selected_payment_method=google_pay
Apple Pay (option 4) initiates card payment with selected_payment_method=apple_pay
Flight categorization returns PLUS_BAS, PLUS_RAPIDE, PREMIUM categories
PLUS_BAS is cheapest flight option
PLUS_RAPIDE is fastest flight option
Booking ref format TRV-XXXXXX (6 alphanumeric chars)
Ticket download endpoint returns 404 for missing files
Complete flow generates downloadable PDF ticket
Payment page returns HTML after card selection with sim=1
Payment page simulated mode works
Payment page returns 404 without payment intent
'annuler' cancels booking and resets state to idle
Payment retry flow triggered after failure
Option 3 cancels from retry state
Whisper transcribe endpoint exists and accepts multipart form
OGG file transcription endpoint works
Webhook verification succeeds with correct token
Webhook verification fails with wrong token
frontend_tests_passed: Payment operators section with 4 operator cards
All operator cards show correct status badges (Missing - as expected with placeholder creds)
How It Works section with 6 steps
Webhook Configuration section with endpoint and verify token
Good text contrast on dark background

mocked_apis.note: All payment APIs are SIMULATED when credentials are placeholder values
mocked_list: Stripe Google/Apple Pay - simulated (no real key)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent
Amadeus API - mock flights generated when no real key

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/message?phone={phone}&message={text}
seed_data_creation: None - tests use unique phone numbers for clean sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend v5.0.0 with PaymentService supporting 4 operators. Frontend is a passive status dashboard only. Full conversation flow tested via /api/test/message endpoint. Payment APIs auto-succeed in simulation mode. Use simulate_fail=true query param to test failure flows.
